title: cassia surattensis subsp. glauca
intro: Cassia surattensis subsp. glauca is a plant species within the legume family, commonly known as a type of senna plant due to its similarity in properties to the Cassia senna plant. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cassia surattensis subsp. glauca include its potential to stimulate bowel movements, treat constipation and other digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and aid in weight loss. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
